conditionThreshold.filter: resource.type = "cloud_run_job" AND metric.type = "run.googleapis.com/job/completed_execution_count" AND metric.labels.result = "failed" AND resource.labels.job_name = "__JOB_NAME__"

documentation.content: The nightly Cloud Run Job `__JOB_NAME__` (`embrapa ingest all`) had a FAILED execution: the Bronze refresh that feeds Silver -> Gold -> the serving marts did not complete, so the dashboard data will go stale. A Cloud Run job execution counts as `failed` only when a task exhausted its retries (the CLI itself also retries upstream calls via tenacity), so this is a real, non-transient failure. Investigate: `gcloud run jobs executions list --job __JOB_NAME__ --region <INGEST_JOB_REGION>` then `... executions describe <execution>`. The pipeline also emits structured events consumable by `embrapa monitor`.
